top_signals.title: Gold Seesaws on Ceasefire Headlines as NFP, Rate Hike Fears Loom
top_signals.summary: Gold steadied and clawed back earlier losses Monday, trading up 1.08% to $4,525.34 per ounce as diplomatic signals out of the Middle East offered tentative relief, even as the broader picture remained anything but settled. Spot silver also gained, rising 1.59% to $76.17/oz, tracking gold's modest recovery. The session's tone was set by competing headlines from Washington and Tehran. President Donald Trump took to Truth Social to claim progress on Lebanon, saying both Israel and Hezbollah had agreed to halt hostilities and noting a productive call…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lloyd’s Register grants AiP to HD Hyundai Samho for container loading vision system
top_signals.summary: The announcement marks a step towards wider adoption of digitally enabled bridge systems and enhanced situational awareness at sea. Lloyd’s Register (LR) has awarded Approval in Principle (AiP) to HD Hyundai Samho for a container ship design standard supporting NAV1 compliance. The AiP, presented at Posidonia 2026, centres on a remote camera system designed to ...

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fuel Switch Snapshot: Rotterdam B100-LSMGO spread narrows further
top_signals.summary: B100’s discounts to conventional fuels in Rotterdam have narrowed yet again, as conventional fuel prices have dropped for a second straight week. B100’s discount to HSFO has narrowed by $116/mt to $47/mt. B100’s discounts to VLSFO and LSMGO have narrowed by $88/mt and $124/mt to $149/mt and $428/mt, respectively.
